mapper.sql: SELECT 'xm_user_work' AS tableName, uw.id AS workId, uw.work_type AS workType, uw.task_ref_id AS taskRefId, CAST(uw.user_id AS CHAR) AS userId, uw.title AS title, uw.description AS description, uw.cover_url AS coverUrl, CASE WHEN uw.is_public = 1 THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS isPublic, uw.status AS status, CASE WHEN uw.is_public = 1 THEN uw.update_time ELSE NULL END AS publishedAt, uw.create_time AS createdAt, uw.update_time AS updatedAt, uw.version AS version FROM xm_user_work uw
mapper.select: ORDER BY uw.update_time DESC, uw.id DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO xm_user_work ( id, tenant_id, user_id, work_type, task_ref_id, title, description, cover_url, is_public, status, version, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, del_flag ) VALUES ( #{record.id}, '000000', #{record.userId}, #{record.workType}, #{record.taskRefId}, #{record.title}, #{record.description}, #{record.coverUrl}, #{record.isPublic}, #{record.status}, #{record.version}, #{record.createBy}, #{record.createdAt}, #{record.updateBy}, #{record.updatedAt}, 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE xm_user_work SET title = #{record.title}, description = #{record.description}, cover_url = #{record.coverUrl}, is_public = #{record.isPublic}, status = #{record.status}, version = #{record.version}, update_by = #{record.updateBy}, update_time = #{record.updatedAt} WHERE id = #{record.id} AND version = #{record.previousVersion} AND del_flag = 0
